languages.text: Кажется, сами взоры этих искаженных варпом существ источают заразу.
The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.
languages.original_text: Кажется, сами взоры этих искаженных варпом существ источают заразу.

traits.locale_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.
The very gazes of these twisted warp worshippers seem to exude pestilence.
The very gazes of these twisted warp worshippers seem to exude pestilence.
The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

languages.text: 这些被亚空间扭曲的生物，仿佛连目光都在散播瘟疫。
languages.original_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

traits.locale_text: 这些被亚空间扭曲的生物，仿佛连目光都在散播瘟疫。

languages.text: Hasta la mirada de estos seres retorcidos por la disformidad parece rezumar plagas.
languages.original_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

traits.locale_text: Hasta la mirada de estos seres retorcidos por la disformidad parece rezumar plagas.

languages.text: La corruption se loge jusque dans les yeux de ces créatures altérées par le Warp.
languages.original_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

traits.locale_text: La corruption se loge jusque dans les yeux de ces créatures altérées par le Warp.

languages.text: Öteboyutun çarpıttığı bu yaratıkların bakışları bile âdeta hastalık saçıyor.
languages.original_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

traits.locale_text: Öteboyutun çarpıttığı bu yaratıkların bakışları bile âdeta hastalık saçıyor.

languages.text: Die bloßen Blicke vom Warp verdorbenen Kreaturen scheinen Pestilenz abzusondern.
languages.original_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

traits.locale_text: Die bloßen Blicke vom Warp verdorbenen Kreaturen scheinen Pestilenz abzusondern.

languages.text: これらの歪んだ生き物の視線は、疫病を放つようだ。
languages.original_text: The very gazes of these warp-twisted creatures seem to exude pestilence.

traits.locale_text: これらの歪んだ生き物の視線は、疫病を放つようだ。
